summary: NoETL agent-to-playbook result hydration is fixed for large child MCP results. The final GKE smoke proved the parent travel runtime receives data.ok=true plus the first 10 activity items from an Amadeus child execution whose raw payload externalized to a worker-local disk reference.

pull_requests.title: fix(agent): hydrate sub-playbook result from terminal events
fix(agent): resolve terminal event result references
fix(agent): preserve compact NoETL child data for parent routing
fix(agent): read through disk refs from child terminal results
fix(agent): expose compact child data at agent data root
fix(agent): project bounded control data for large child results

code_changes_final_shape: noetl/tools/agent/executor.py fetches the sub-execution terminal event, resolves references when possible, expands flattened data_* context, and now prefers bounded control_data when a child payload externalized on another worker pod.
noetl/worker/result_handler.py emits bounded control_data for large MCP-like results: status scalars, metadata, counts, and the first 10 collection items under data.items-compatible shape.
noetl/worker/nats_worker.py preserves control_data through the strict event projection without opening the generic data-plane data key.

tests.command: uv run python -m py_compile noetl/tools/agent/executor.py noetl/worker/nats_worker.py noetl/worker/result_handler.py

provider_sanity.fallback: Ollama MCP call failed because the GKE cluster currently has no ollama or ollama-bridge Service/Pod in namespace noetl.

deployment_notes: The GKE bump_image lifecycle playbook reported a final verify_images mismatch twice because it selected an old terminating worker pod. Direct kubectl rollout status and pod image checks confirmed the non-terminating server and workers were on the target image.
The old v2.37.7 GKE smoke proved the parent could route on scalar crumbs but still lacked item data across pods. v2.37.8 fixed that by emitting bounded control_data before event projection.

The Ollama provider sanity run completed via fallback because this GKE cluster currently does not deploy ollama/ollama-bridge; this is infrastructure state, not part of the agent-result hydration engine fix.
secrets: No secret values were printed or written.
